cards.name: Bread and Circuses
cards.effect_text: All players gain 1 Coin on their next turn.

cards.name: Senate Decree
cards.effect_text: All players reveal the top 2 cards of their deck. Cards costing 5 or more are drawn into hand. Cards costing 4 or less are destroyed.

cards.name: Barbarian Incursion
cards.effect_text: Each player may discard a card. Players that do gain 2 Coins.

cards.name: Plague Spreads
cards.effect_text: Each player destroys a card in their hand.

cards.name: Triumph of Rome
cards.effect_text: Each Player gains a random card from the Market Deck and then gains Gratia equal to that card's cost.

cards.name: Grain Shortage
cards.effect_text: Players may not gain cards costing 4 or more until the start of the next turn.

cards.name: Slave Revolt
cards.effect_text: Destroy the lowest-cost card in the Gallery and replace it. If there is a tie, destroy all cards that tied.

cards.name: Imperial Tax
cards.effect_text: Each player loses 1 Coins on their next turn.
